chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1541 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7423/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.7424/2021 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 21-10-2021 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate for the petitioners..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. Through this petition, the petitioners seek release of their salaries, however, it appears that earlier pursuant to certain orders of the Court they were given employment on contract basis which expired in 2017. Being aggrieved, both the petitioners filed C. P. No. D-1584 of 2017, which was disposed of vide order dated 08-05-2018 with certain directions. It is informed that the said order is under compliance and a contempt application is pending. In that case a fresh petition for such purposes including release of salaries is not maintainable as firstly the petitioners are to be inducted either on contract or on regularization basis and only then the question of salaries would arise. Accordingly, petition being misconceived is hereby dismissed with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
